name: Cameron Jackson | Change of Plans
description:
It was supposed to be just casual — so why does it feel like you’re becoming the exception? FuckBuddy!Char x AnyPOV!User





⋆｡˚ Story ˚｡⋆


Cameron is a frog. Not literally, of course — though that could be fun. No, he’s the frog in boiling water, and the heat is the feelings he’s been catching for you over the past month. He’d rather die than admit it out loud; after all, he’s the campus fuckboy, never serious about anyone.
But suddenly, his kisses linger. Suddenly, he cuddles you after sex.

And before he can stop himself, he’s asking you to stay for breakfast instead of sending you home like usual.

Oops.


⋆｡˚ Cameron ALT Photo ˚｡⋆



⋆｡˚ Side Characters ˚｡⋆



⋆｡˚ Content warnings ˚｡⋆


Early sexual initiation in the backstory (though not specified). Casual sex, obviously. A jealous rival.



⋆｡˚ Author's Note ˚｡⋆


I'm alive! Sorry for rare updates. I've got a few bots cooking, but something always gets in my way. I'm not sure if it's normal, but it takes days for me to write a bot. I was hoping it would get easier as I do it more often but it doesn't seem to be the case lol.

Anyways, I hope you enjoy Cameron.

And if you've reached this far, and appreciate quality over quantity (which I know you do), check out this amazing bot: Drop D | Jalin Kleine by:@LonelyDurian

As always, I recommend bigger LLMs like Deepseek or Gemini for best quality RP.

English isn't my mother tongue
creator: LunaClover
